title: SEXUAL ASSAULT RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: SEXUAL ASSAULT RESOURCE CENTER SEXUAL ASSAULT RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person and telephone accompaniment to hospitals in Washington County, law enforcement agencies, schools, clinics, shelters, and other secure locations, supporting individuals during medical exams, law enforcement interviews, and other related situations. Limited case management services including ongoing emotional support, safety planning, assistance through criminal and civil justice processes, address confidentiality, crime victim compensation, housing advocacy, protection orders, and referrals to additional resources. Also offers limited peer-led support and educational groups, as well as prevention education and community presentations. 100 NE Campton Drive Hillsboro, OR 97006 Eligibility: Individuals who live, work, attend school, or had sexual assault incident occur in Washington County Hours: Phone: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week All other services: No standard hours Email (503) 640-5311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 640-5311 Toll-free (886) 640-5311 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, chat, text, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 67, stop: SW 158th & Greystone Court/Walker Road Max stop: Merlo Park & 158th Ride Connection for scheduled rides available Services: Case/Care Management * Sexual Assault Issues Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Crime Victim Compensation * Sexual Assault Issues Protective/Restraining Orders * Sexual Assault Issues Sexual Assault Prevention Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Sexual Assault Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 24-HOUR SUPPORT AND RESOURCE LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SEXUAL ASSAULT RESOURCE CENTER
